question_text: What does the law of conservation of energy state?

options.label: A
options.text: Energy can be created and destroyed freely

options.label: B
options.text: Energy cannot be created or destroyed, only transferred or transformed

options.label: C
options.text: Energy always increases in a closed system

options.label: D
options.text: Energy is only found in moving objects

explanation: The law of conservation of energy is one of the most important rules in physics. It tells us that energy never disappears or appears from nowhere — it just changes from one form to another, like when chemical energy in fuel becomes heat energy when it burns.
